/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libwiimote_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libwiimote_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/wiimote_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/wiimote_msgs/msg/ir_source_info__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wiimote_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/wiimote_msgs/msg/state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wiimote_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/wiimote_msgs/msg/timed_switch__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/cat_robot/src/ros2_ws/build/wiimote_msgs:/home/user/ros2_humble/install/geometry_msgs/lib:/home/user/ros2_humble/install/std_msgs/lib:/home/user/ros2_humble/install/builtin_interfaces/lib:/home/user/ros2_humble/install/rosidl_typesupport_c/lib:/home/user/ros2_humble/install/rcpputils/lib:/home/user/ros2_humble/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib:/home/user/ros2_humble/install/rcutils/lib: libwiimote_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/geometry_msgs/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/std_msgs/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/builtin_interfaces/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/rosidl_typesupport_c/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/geometry_msgs/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/std_msgs/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/builtin_interfaces/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /home/user/ros2_humble/install/rcutils/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/user/ros2_humble/install/rcpputils/lib
